title: Champagne Supernova
why_this_song: Champagne Supernova by Oasis (1995) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Where were you while we were getting high?"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Where were you while we were getting high?"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "In a champagne supernova in the sky"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "In a champagne supernova in the sky"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "How many special people change?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "getting" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "getting" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "high" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "high" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: In a champagne supernova in the sky

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: How many lives are living strange?
But you and I, we live and die

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Champagne Supernova" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Champagne Supernova" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Champagne Supernova" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Champagne Supernova", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Champagne Supernova" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Champagne Supernova" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
